canonical_definition: The latent ability of a model to grasp the overall scene, context, and structure of an image, as opposed to just identifying individual objects.
papers: Image Textualization: An Automatic Framework for Generating Rich and Detailed Image Descriptions
OW-VISCapTor: Abstractors for Open-World Video Instance Segmentation and Captioning

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to grasp the overall scene, context, and structure of an image, as opposed to just identifying individual objects.
definitions.paper: Image Textualization: An Automatic Framework for Generating Rich and Detailed Image Descriptions

definitions.text: The model's comprehensive ability to not only identify and segment objects but also to generate meaningful descriptive captions, integrating visual and semantic information.
definitions.paper: OW-VISCapTor: Abstractors for Open-World Video Instance Segmentation and Captioning
